programmes.show_description: Medics rush to a 60-year-old woman with suspected multiple injuries, trapped in her car, and to a 36-year-old knife attack victim, who has extensive injuries to his neck and face.

programmes.show_name: Marina of Greece: The Forgotten Royal
programmes.show_description: This programme lifts the lid on how Princess Marina - a royal refugee with a shattered childhood - became a key player in Britain's most famous family.
In 2015, Amanda Taylor brutally murdered her father-in-law and took a selfie with the body. On the run and posting online, police raced to stop her before she killed again.

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: After Queen Thistle reads the children a story about stars, the children wonder where they go in the daytime, so they pay a visit to the Wise Old Elf. (VS)
Daddy Pig finds it hard work when he runs a race to raise money for the school roof. It is far easier to run when a wasp is chasing him!
Washing: Daddy Pig hangs his clean football shirt out to dry, but Peppa, George and Mummy splash it with mud.
There's a fly in the den! Fluff is in hot pursuit, and nothing will stand in his way - furniture, high shelves, or even a sleeping Tweedy. (Ep16)
Monkey travels to Northern Ireland to find out about the city of Belfast. He tries some traditional Northern Irish food and explores the land of giants! (Ep4)
...Friends: Big World Big Adventures! When Thomas loses his voice trying to sing opera like his Italian friends, he must find a new way to pass on a very important message. (VS)
Elvis is driving Steele up the wall with his constant singing. Elvis is practising for his star turn in Pontypandy's forthcoming charity concert. (VS)
...Barrier Reef. Peppa and Family's holiday continues. Today everyone is going to work on Mrs Kangaroo's submarine! (VS)
...Adventures of Paddington. Jonathan teaches Paddington football, but Paddington kicks the ball into Mr. Curry's garden. They decide to get it back by climbing over the fence. (VS)
During a toy giveaway, Posy accidentally lets Zac take Pip's favourite toy, a Jack-in-the-box. When nothing convinces Zac to swap back, Posy makes a big sacrifice of her own. (VS)
When the Ruff-Ruff Pack steals Mr Porter's Mini-Donut Maker, the Moto Pups set off to get the machine back in one piece. (VS)
When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the crew comes up with a bright idea to help Rubble enjoy the starry night.
Grandpa Pig found his night at the hospital so comfortable, he's reluctant to leave! Peppa and Suzy volunteers to nurse him at home and make sure he's as comfortable as in hospital.
Dr Hamster is visiting the playgroup today and has brought a giant ant farm. But with all the talk about ants, nobody noticed they escaped and started moving things in the classroom!
Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.
Stan and Gran find a mysterious old carved piece of wood while they're beachcombing. Is it from the wreck of Porthole Pete or a carving of a mermaid?

The greater horseshoe bat was once widespread in the UK but due to habitat loss their numbers plummeted. The Vincent Wildlife Trust look after around 50% of the UK's population.

Peppa and family's holiday is coming to an end but there's still time to play with a boomerang and make friends with Mr Wallaby. (VS)

Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

Humdinger, Sid, and Sweetie have joined forces to try and take over the Lookout.

programmes.show_name: New: Building the Impossible with Rob Bell
programmes.show_description: Rob heads to England's south coast where he explores a trio of lighthouses built to protect vessels. He also experiences gravity-defying Victorian innovation.
Dara O Briain explores the immense power of Italy's most active volcanoes. With stunning visuals and gripping stories, he uncovers their deadly force and lasting impact on our planet. (Ep1/2)
In Naples, Dara explores the story of Mount Vesuvius and its 79AD eruption, then scales Mount Vesuvius's enormous crater and discovers how technology tracks volcano activity 24/7. (Ep2/2)
...Are All Men Toxic? Piers battles some of the manosphere's most extreme influencers and digs deep into the crisis facing men today.
